title: cassine lanceolata
intro: Cassine lanceolata, also known as the Cassine or Wild Privet, is a plant species native to Africa, particularly in South Africa. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Cassine lanceolata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
